extraction_reasoning: The litigation tables distinguish matters against the Company, Promoter and Directors from matters by those parties; I counted only the against rows. Criminal proceedings against the Company, Promoter and Directors are each Nil, regulatory/statutory actions against the Company, Promoter and Directors are each Nil, and taxation matters against the Company and Promoter/Directors are Nil; the material civil amounts of ₹37.7 million against the Company and ₹231.9 million against Directors are not included in the requested aggregate because the latter is a personal matter, while the Company’s ₹37.7 million is included. The contingent-liabilities total is not disclosed in this risk section, and no date or stated Total is provided. Customer concentration percentages are disclosed for a single U.S. customer only, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customers; the percentages use total revenues from contracts with customers for Fiscals 2018–2020 and the three months ended June 30, 2020. Litigation amounts use ₹ million, converted to crore at ₹10 million per crore: ₹37.7 million ÷ 10 = ₹3.77 crore.
